abilities.name: Crazy Idea
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may be dealt 1 damage to draw a card.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: System Recalibration
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target allies. If the target is an ally, instead of being dealt damage, the target heals 2.

triggers.name: Another Man's Trash
triggers.text: Once per activation. Enemy only. Draw a card of value 1-5 from your discard pile.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then, the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: I Can Rebuild It
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a type of enemy marker not on this model's stat card. Place this model in base contact with the target, then remove the target and put it onto this model's card. If this model has two markers on its card, remove them all and replace this model with Calypso MK II.
